name: MANASI PANT
education: [1] Master of International Affairs, Columbia University | Economics, Data Analysis. [2] Bachelor of Arts, FLAME University | Psychology, Culture Studies.
bio:
I like learning about and making sense of new things, always — data, ideas, systems, people. Some of that shows up in my research and consulting work, and the rest in my choice of ecclectic reads, periodic contemplations, and constant experimentation (currently: learning pastels, getting back to singing, plotting my future as a dog mom).

This site is one of those experiments: a place for projects both personal and professional that hold more insight into me than my resume ever can. Thank you for joining my journey of growth and play!
